\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n        \n\n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n\n \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n            \n                \n\n\n    \n        Sales Cloud Pricing FAQ\n    \n\n\n\n            \n            \n                \n    \n    \n    \n    \n        \n            \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Agentforce Sales Pricing\n                        \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Common Questions\n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n            \n                \n                    More\n                \n                \n                    \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Agentforce Sales Pricing\n                        \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Common Questions\n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n                    \n                \n            \n        \n        \n            \n            \n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                            \n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What are the main pricing plans for Agentforce Sales?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales offers flexible pricing plans to grow with your business. Choose from Starter Suite, Pro Suite, Enterprise, Unlimited, and Agentforce 1 Sales—each with increasing levels of AI, automation, integration, and customization. Want help finding the right fit? Request a call with a Salesforce account executive to learn more.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How does Agentforce Sales pricing work?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales pricing follows a per-user, per-month subscription model. You pay a monthly fee for each user who needs access. Pricing varies by edition, with each offering different features and levels of functionality to fit your business needs.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Is there a free version of Agentforce Sales?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce offers a free 30-day trial for all Agentforce Sales editions, with simple setup so you can get started quickly and explore key sales capabilities. If you'd like to explore an all-in-one CRM experience across sales, service, marketing, commerce, and Slack, you can also start a free 30-day trial of Starter Suite for up to 10 users.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How much does Starter Suite cost?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Starter Suite costs $25 USD per user, per month. It's an all-in-one CRM designed for small businesses, bringing together sales, service, marketing and commerce tools. Plus, it includes Slack at no extra cost for seamless collaboration.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What is the Agentforce Sales Enterprise plan?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales Enterprise Edition is an advanced CRM for sales teams, with built-in AI and automation to help grow revenue faster. It includes everything in Pro Suite, plus advanced pipeline management and forecasting, opportunity scoring, conversation intelligence, APIs and Agentforce with the free Salesforce Foundations add-on.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n\n\n                        \n                    \n                \n\n                \n            \n        \n            \n            \n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                            \n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Are there upfront costs or additional fees?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce has all kinds of add-ons, apps, and additional products to help your company stay ahead in your industry. Call us at 1-800-664-9073 to discuss exactly what kind of products you’re looking to add and how we can help.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What if my business priorities and product needs have changed?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                We know things don’t always go according to plan, and we’re here and will try our best to support. Reach out to a sales representative at 1-800-664-9073 to discuss options.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Do Salesforce products integrate with outside applications and systems?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                In many cases, Salesforce products integrate directly with many outside applications and systems to help you connect your data. For those that don’t have built-in integration, like on-premises data sources, you can purchase licenses of MuleSoft, work with our integration partners, or use apps on AgentExchange. Talk to a sales representative to get an idea of what integration solution works best with the Salesforce products you use.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What support and service packages are available?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                We offer several advisory, adoption, and support plans to our customers. To learn more, visit Success Cloud.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How long are your contracts?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Most Salesforce products use annual contracts, but Salesforce subscription terms vary. Chat with a sales representative to discuss payment and billing options for your products.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Can I upgrade at any time? Can I add more products later on?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                You can add products or upgrade at any time, but some products may need to scale together. Reach out to our sales department at 1-800-664-9073 to see what works for your business.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n\n\n                        \n                    \n                \n\n                \n            \n        \n    \n            \n        \n    \n    \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n            \n                This page is provided for information purposes only and subject to change. AI can be added to Enterprise and above. Contact a sales representative for detailed pricing information.\n\n            \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n    \n\n\n    \n    \n\n\n\n\n\n    \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n        \n        \n \n\n\n    \n        Sales Cloud Pricing FAQ\n    \n\n\n\n            \n            \n                \n    \n    \n    \n    \n        \n            \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Agentforce Sales Pricing\n                        \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Common Questions\n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n            \n                \n                    More\n                \n                \n                    \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Agentforce Sales Pricing\n                        \n                    \n                \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                        \n                            Common Questions\n                        \n                    \n                \n            \n                    \n                \n            \n        \n        \n            \n            \n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                            \n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What are the main pricing plans for Agentforce Sales?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales offers flexible pricing plans to grow with your business. Choose from Starter Suite, Pro Suite, Enterprise, Unlimited, and Agentforce 1 Sales—each with increasing levels of AI, automation, integration, and customization. Want help finding the right fit? Request a call with a Salesforce account executive to learn more.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How does Agentforce Sales pricing work?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales pricing follows a per-user, per-month subscription model. You pay a monthly fee for each user who needs access. Pricing varies by edition, with each offering different features and levels of functionality to fit your business needs.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Is there a free version of Agentforce Sales?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce offers a free 30-day trial for all Agentforce Sales editions, with simple setup so you can get started quickly and explore key sales capabilities. If you'd like to explore an all-in-one CRM experience across sales, service, marketing, commerce, and Slack, you can also start a free 30-day trial of Starter Suite for up to 10 users.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How much does Starter Suite cost?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Starter Suite costs $25 USD per user, per month. It's an all-in-one CRM designed for small businesses, bringing together sales, service, marketing and commerce tools. Plus, it includes Slack at no extra cost for seamless collaboration.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What is the Agentforce Sales Enterprise plan?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales Enterprise Edition is an advanced CRM for sales teams, with built-in AI and automation to help grow revenue faster. It includes everything in Pro Suite, plus advanced pipeline management and forecasting, opportunity scoring, conversation intelligence, APIs and Agentforce with the free Salesforce Foundations add-on.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n\n\n                        \n                    \n                \n\n                \n            \n        \n            \n            \n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                            \n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Are there upfront costs or additional fees?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce has all kinds of add-ons, apps, and additional products to help your company stay ahead in your industry. Call us at 1-800-664-9073 to discuss exactly what kind of products you’re looking to add and how we can help.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What if my business priorities and product needs have changed?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                We know things don’t always go according to plan, and we’re here and will try our best to support. Reach out to a sales representative at 1-800-664-9073 to discuss options.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Do Salesforce products integrate with outside applications and systems?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                In many cases, Salesforce products integrate directly with many outside applications and systems to help you connect your data. For those that don’t have built-in integration, like on-premises data sources, you can purchase licenses of MuleSoft, work with our integration partners, or use apps on AgentExchange. Talk to a sales representative to get an idea of what integration solution works best with the Salesforce products you use.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What support and service packages are available?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                We offer several advisory, adoption, and support plans to our customers. To learn more, visit Success Cloud.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How long are your contracts?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Most Salesforce products use annual contracts, but Salesforce subscription terms vary. Chat with a sales representative to discuss payment and billing options for your products.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Can I upgrade at any time? Can I add more products later on?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                You can add products or upgrade at any time, but some products may need to scale together. You pay a monthly fee for each user who needs access. Pricing varies by edition, with each offering different features and levels of functionality to fit your business needs.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Is there a free version of Agentforce Sales?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce offers a free 30-day trial for all Agentforce Sales editions, with simple setup so you can get started quickly and explore key sales capabilities. If you'd like to explore an all-in-one CRM experience across sales, service, marketing, commerce, and Slack, you can also start a free 30-day trial of Starter Suite for up to 10 users.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    How much does Starter Suite cost?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Starter Suite costs $25 USD per user, per month. It's an all-in-one CRM designed for small businesses, bringing together sales, service, marketing and commerce tools. Plus, it includes Slack at no extra cost for seamless collaboration.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    What is the Agentforce Sales Enterprise plan?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Agentforce Sales Enterprise Edition is an advanced CRM for sales teams, with built-in AI and automation to help grow revenue faster. It includes everything in Pro Suite, plus advanced pipeline management and forecasting, opportunity scoring, conversation intelligence, APIs and Agentforce with the free Salesforce Foundations add-on.\n\n            \n        \n        \n        \n    \n\n\n\n    \n\n\n                        \n                    \n                \n\n                \n            \n        \n            \n            \n            \n                \n                \n                    \n                        \n                            \n                            \n\n    \n        \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n    \n        \n                \n                    Are there upfront costs or additional fees?\n                    \n                        \n                            \n                                \n                                \n                            \n                        \n                    \n                \n        \n    \n    \n         \n        \n            \n                Salesforce has all kinds of add-ons, apps, and additional products to help your company stay ahead in your industry.
